items.name: Nachos Mexicanos
items.description: House-made corn tortilla chips, topped with shredded cheese and melty queso. Garnished with pico de gallo.

items.name: Nachos de Frijoles
items.description: House-made corn tortilla chips, topped with refried beans, shredded cheese, and melty hot queso. Garnished with pico de gallo.

items.name: Nachos de Carne
items.description: House-made corn tortilla chips, topped with shredded cheese, melty queso, and marinated ground beef. Garnished with pico de gallo.

items.name: Nachos de Pollo
items.description: House-made corn tortilla chips, topped with shredded cheese, melty queso, and shredded chicken. Garnished with pico de gallo.

items.name: Nachos Combinado
items.description: House-made corn tortilla chips, topped with shredded cheese, melty queso, shredded chicken, and marinated ground beef. Garnished with pico de gallo.

items.name: Guacamole Dip
items.description: A fresh blend of avocado, chopped boiled egg, diced tomato, fresh lime, and spices. Served with corn tortilla chips.

items.name: Enchiladas de Picado
items.description: Salvadoran-style enchilada. Crispy fried tortilla with cheese and tangy curtido, topped with your choice of ground beef or shredded marinated chicken.

items.name: Salvadoran – Style Sandwich de Pollo
items.description: Chicken cooked in a tangy tomato-based sauce. Topped with curtido, cucumber, hard-boiled egg, and beets on a french roll.

items.name: Yucca Con Chicharron
items.description: Fried yucca with pieces of fried pork. Served with curtido and tomato dipping sauce.

items.name: Pastelito de Carne
items.description: Small beef pie. Fried and served with curtido.

items.name: Platanos Con Crema
items.description: Fried plantain served with sour cream and refried beans.

items.name: Pupusa de Queso
items.description: Thick handmade tortilla, filled with cheese. Served with curtido and tomato sauce on the side.

items.name: Pupusa Salvadoreña
items.description: Thick handmade tortilla, filled with cheese and pork. Served with curtido and tomato sauce on the side.

items.name: Pupusa de Frijol
items.description: Thick handmade tortilla, filled with refried bean and cheese. Served with curtido and tomato sauce on the side. Can be served without cheese upon request.

items.name: Pupusa de Chicharrón
items.description: Thick handmade tortilla, filled with just pork. Served with curtido and tomato sauce on the side.

items.name: Pupusa de Loroco
items.description: Thick handmade tortilla, filled with cheese and loroco. Served with curtido and tomato sauce on the side.

items.name: Pupusa Mixta
items.description: Thick handmade tortilla, filled with refried beans, pork, loroco, and cheese. Served with curtido and tomato sauce on the side.

items.name: Taco Salad
items.description: Your choice of beef or chicken. Crispy lettuce, cheese, and pico de gallo served with freshly fried flour tortilla chips. Comes with house dressing on the side.

items.name: Ensalada de la Casa
items.description: House salad with fresh tomato, onions, and cucumber on a bed of crisp iceberg lettuce. House dressing served on the side.

items.name: Taquitos de Lengua
items.description: Three beef tongue tacos. Served with rice and a side salad.

items.name: Los Tacos Platter
items.description: One ground beef taquito, one hard shell chicken taco, and one soft chicken taco. Served with rice and refried beans.

items.name: Tacos Fiesta
items.description: Your choice of three chicken or beef tacos, hard shell, soft taco, or fried. Served with rice, refried beans, sour cream, guacamole, and pico de gallo.

items.name: Tacos al Carbon
items.description: Flour or corn tortilla stuffed with broiled steak or grilled chicken, onions, and peppers. Served with rice and refried beans.

items.name: Burro Grande
items.description: Burrito stuffed with your choice of chicken or ground beef, lettuce, cheese, and pico de gallo in a flour tortilla. Topped with melty queso. Served with rice and refried beans.

items.name: Chimichanga
items.description: A flour tortilla stuffed with either ground beef or shredded chicken in special sauce, fried golden brown. Served with rice and refried beans.

items.name: Fajitas Mixtas
items.description: Beef and chicken fajitas with peppers, tomatoes, and onions. Served with warm flour tortillas, guacamole, sour cream, lettuce, and pico de gallo.

items.name: Fajitas Mexicanas
items.description: Your choice of beef or chicken fajitas with peppers, tomatoes, and onions. Served with warm flour tortillas, guacamole, sour cream, lettuce, and pico de gallo.

items.name: Fajitas De Camarones
items.description: Shrimp fajitas with peppers, tomatoes, and onions. Served with warm flour tortillas, guacamole, sour cream, lettuce, and pico de gallo.

items.name: Sopa de Mariscos
items.description: Seafood soup with light flavorful broth, including shrimp, clams, egg, scallops, mussels, and calamari. Comes with one corn tortilla.

items.name: Mariscada
items.description: Seafood soup in a cream-based broth, including shrimp, clams, egg, scallops, mussels, and calamari. Comes with one corn tortilla.

items.name: Sopa de Res/ Caldo a la Campesina
items.description: Hearty beef and vegetable soup. Comes with one corn tortilla.

items.name: Sopa de Mondongo
items.description: Beef tripe soup. Comes with one corn tortilla.

items.name: Sopa De Gallina
items.description: Hearty Salvadoran chicken soup with vegetables, a side of rice, and a corn tortilla. The chicken can be served in the soup or grilled on the side.

items.name: Nachos Supreme
items.description: Corn tortilla chips with grilled chicken and steak, refried beans, jalapenos, guacamole, sour cream, shredded cheese, and melty queso.

items.name: Grande Coctel de Camarones
items.description: Gently steamed shrimp with fresh lime juice, diced tomatoes, onions, and cilantro.

items.name: Fried Calamari
items.description: Served with a spicy marinara sauce and fresh lime.

items.name: Atlacatl Especial
items.description: Filet mignon with mushroom sauce, coupled with shrimp in a cream sauce.

items.name: Langosta Rellena
items.description: Fresh lobster stuffed with crab meat and finished with a creamy parmesan bechamel topping.

items.name: Churrasco
items.description: Grilled shrimp, steak, pork, chicken, chorizo, grilled onions, peppers, and jalapeno on fries. Comes with rice, guacamole, pico de gallo, a side salad, and a tortilla.

items.name: Camarones Rellenos
items.description: Fresh jumbo shrimp stuffed with crab meat and topped with a creamy parmesan bechamel, with grilled tomato.

items.name: Filete de Pescado
items.description: Grilled filet of fish.

items.name: Sopa de Langosta
items.description: Seafood soup with lobster, crab, shrimp, clams, egg, scallops, mussels, and calamari. Comes with one corn tortilla.

items.name: Especial Atlacatl 2
items.description: Sauteed steak with grilled Salvadoran sausage. Served with fresh cheese, beans, rice, and a side salad.

items.name: Lomo Fino
items.description: Filet mignon sauteed with bacon and topped with mushroom gravy. Served with guacamole, rice, refried beans, and a small salad.

items.name: Carne al Espetón
items.description: Marinated chunks of beef grilled with onions and green peppers, topped with a brown mushroom sauce. Served with rice and a side salad.

items.name: Bistec Encebollado
items.description: Steak sauteed with onions in a tangy tomato-based sauce. Topped with french fries. Served with rice and beans.

items.name: Bistec Poblano
items.description: Steak cubes cooked in spicy tomato salsa. Served with rice, refried beans, and a side salad.

items.name: Carne Asada
items.description: Broiled skirt steak served with a cheese pupusa, curtido, tomato sauce, side salad, and rice.

items.name: Bisteak a Caballo
items.description: Sauteed steak served with two eggs, sunny side up. Comes with refried beans and rice.

items.name: Pollo Asado
items.description: Broiled chicken served with rice, refried beans, and a small salad.

items.name: Pollo en Mantequilla
items.description: Chicken simmered in a tomato cream sauce and served with rice, refried beans, and a small salad.

items.name: Pollo Encebollado
items.description: Half chicken sauteed with onions and a special sauce. Topped with french fries. Served with rice, refried beans, and a small salad.

items.name: Lomo de Puerco
items.description: Grilled pork filet served with refried beans, side salad, and rice.

items.name: Plato Tipico
items.description: Fried pork, grilled Salvadoran sausage, fried plantain, sour cream, and fresh cheese. Served with rice, beans, and a side salad.

items.name: Especial Atlacatl #1
items.description: Grilled pork topped with Salvadoran sausage and fresh cheese. Served with a side salad and rice.

items.name: Chorizos Salvadoreños
items.description: Three Salvadoran sausages topped with hot tomato salsa. Served with rice and refried beans.

items.name: Pescado a la Migueleña
items.description: Fried whole rockfish topped with green peppers, tomato, and onions. Served with rice, a small salad, and one tortilla.

items.name: Pescado Asado
items.description: Grilled whole rockfish in a lemon butter sauce with cilantro and capers. Served with rice, salad, and one tortilla.

items.name: Camarones en Crema
items.description: Shrimp in a cream sauce. Served with rice and steamed vegetables. Comes with one tortilla.

items.name: Camarones al Ajillo
items.description: Shrimp in a garlic butter sauce. Served with rice, a small salad, and one tortilla.

items.name: Camarones Entomatados
items.description: Shrimp sauteed in a tomato sauce, served with steamed vegetables and rice. Comes with one tortilla.

items.name: Salmon
items.description: Grilled salmon with cream sauce.

items.name: Huevos Rancheros
items.description: Three fried eggs topped with fresh tomato salsa on a flour tortilla and bed of rice.

items.name: Lengua en Salsa de Tomate
items.description: Beef tongue with tomato sauce served with rice and refried beans.

items.name: Lengua Empanizada
items.description: Egg-battered beef tongue with a lemon butter sauce. Served with rice and refried beans.

items.name: Combo Plate 3
items.description: One tamal de pollo, one taco, and one pupusa.

items.name: Tio Salvador
items.description: Grilled steak served with french fries and a side salad.

items.name: Tia Maria
items.description: Grilled chicken breast served with fries and a small salad.

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.description: Chicken breast strips coated in house-made bread crumbs, fried golden brown, and served with french fries.

items.name: Fried Shrimp
items.description: Shrimp coated in house-made bread crumbs, fried golden brown, and served with french fries.

items.name: Tamal de Elote
items.description: Yellow corn tamale served with sour cream.

items.name: Tamal de Pollo
items.description: Salvadoran-style tamale filled with chicken.

items.name: Side of Fried Yucca
items.description: Comes with spicy red dipping sauce.

items.name: (1) Side Taco
items.description: Shredded chicken or ground beef. Choose soft, fried, or hard shell.

items.name: (1) Side Taco Al Carbon
items.description: Steak or grilled chicken taco.

items.name: Tortilla
items.description: Corn or flour.
